request.description: Returns complete profile data for a given user id.
Updates profile data from JSON payload for the authenticated owner.
Returns the current authenticated user id.
Returns a full event detail payload including management and purchase flags.
Updates an event if the current user is authorized.
Deletes an event if the current user is authorized.
Returns events purchased by the authenticated user.
Searches event locations using the external geocoding service.
Returns paginated published events with optional search and tag filters.
Creates an event from multipart data, optionally including image and tags.
Adds a review to a course from the authenticated user.
Returns a full course detail payload including permissions and progress flags.
Updates a course if the current user is authorized.
Deletes a course if the current user is authorized.
Marks a lesson as completed and returns updated course progress information.
Returns the lesson video URL if the user has access rights.
Returns courses subscribed by the authenticated user.
Returns paginated published courses with optional search and tag filters.
Creates a course from multipart data, optionally including image and tags.
Activates or deactivates a user account by id.
Returns paginated users for admin management with optional text filtering.
Updates event moderation status (published or draft) by id.
Returns paginated events for admin management with optional text filtering.
Updates course moderation status (published or draft) by id.
Returns paginated courses for admin management with optional text filtering.
Deletes a review by id.
Returns all reviews available for moderation.
Returns paginated orders sorted by date for the admin panel.
Removes an item from the authenticated user's cart by item id.
Processes payment and finalizes the current pending order.
Adds a subscription line item to the authenticated user's pending order.
Adds an event to the authenticated user's pending order.
Adds a course to the authenticated user's pending order.
Returns the current authenticated user's pending cart order.
Registers a user from a JSON payload and attempts automatic login.
Issues fresh credentials using a refresh token from cookie or authorization header.
Invalidates current authentication context and clears auth cookies.
Authenticates a user with username and password.
Returns monthly lessons completed by the user.
Returns completion breakdown for students of a course.
Returns completed vs pending lessons for one user in one course.
Returns overlap between user interests and course tags.
Returns completed vs in-progress course counts for a user.
Returns gender distribution for enrollments in a course.
Returns age-range distribution for enrollments in a course.
Returns profile image bytes for a user id.
Returns event image bytes for an event id.
Returns course image bytes for a course id.
Returns global UI/session metadata used by frontend clients.
